text: When checking for watchdog response, we have to wait for isGenerating or 5s passed before we'd take not isGenerating as "complete"
description: ERROR: Invalid JSON. Error: No JSON closing brace found. Retry JSON.

status.comment: Implemented watchdog response-completion gating in codex-session: defer completion until generation is seen or grace period elapses (default 5s), preventing early JSON parse failures. Added regression tests for the new gating behavior; codex-session tests and typecheck pass.
